function.name: _app_get_define_type
function.description:
Get the list of supported object types (Define Object Types) in the current application definition.

[Purpose]
- Must be executed before calling _app_get_define_list
- Used to get valid type enumeration values
- Prevent AI from using non-existent object types

[Mandatory Rules]
- Before calling this interface, _app_get_define_list cannot be directly called
- type cannot be assumed out of thin air

[Description]
- Only reads draft state definitions
- Does not modify any data
